---
title: "Mathematical_notation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Mathematical_notation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


$$
i = 1,\dots,N, \qquad
j = 1,\dots,J, \qquad
k = 1,\dots,K_j
$$

$$
\beta \sim \mathcal{U}(a = 0.02,\; b = 0.1)
$$
$$
\alpha = \exp(-66.77 \times \beta - 2.325)
$$
$$
t_i \sim \textit{Gompertz}(\alpha,\; \beta,\; a = 15,\; b = 100)
$$
$$
f(t \mid \alpha,\beta)
=
\alpha \times \exp(\beta \times t) \times
\exp\!\left(
-\frac{\alpha}{\beta}(e^{\beta \times t}-1)
\right)
$$
$$
\gamma_{k_1 = 1} < \gamma_{k_1 = 2} < \gamma_{k_1 = 3} < \gamma_{k_1 = 4}
$$
$$
\gamma_{k_j = 1} = 1.5
$$
$$
\gamma_{k=2,…,K_j} \sim \textit{TN}(
\mu = k + 0.5,\;
\sigma = 10,\;
a,\;
b = \infty)
$$
$$
a = 1.5
$$
$$
a = \gamma_{k-1}
$$
$$
z_{i,j} \sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_{i,j},\; \sigma = 1)
$$
$$
\boldsymbol{z}_i \sim \mathcal{MVN}(
{\mu}_{i,j},\; 
\mathbf{R}),
$$
$$
\mathbf{R} \sim \textit{LKJ}(\eta = 1)
$$
$$
\mu_{i,j} = \textit{beta}_{0_j} + \textit{beta}_j \times \ln(t_i)
$$
$$
\textit{beta}_{0_j} \sim \textit{TN}(\mu = 0,\; \sigma = 10,\; 
a = -\infty,\; b = 0)
$$
$$
\textit{beta}_{j} \sim \textit{TN}(\mu = 0,\; \sigma = 10,\; 
a = 0,\; b = \infty)
$$
$$
y_{i,j} =
\begin{cases}
1, & \text{if } z_{i,j} \le 1.5, \\[6pt]
k_j, & \text{if } \gamma_{j,k_j-1} < z_{i,j} \le \gamma_{j,k_j},
\quad k_j=2,\dots,K_j-1, \\[6pt]
K_j, & \text{if } \gamma_{j,K_j-1} < z_{i,j} 
\end{cases}
$$
